name: Pinecone
one_liner: Pinecone provides a fully managed, serverless vector database that enables developers to build accurate, scalable AI applications using vector embeddings.

ambiguities: Founded year: official company page states 2019; Tracxn lists 2016 (possibly reflecting Edo Liberty's pre-incorporation research at AWS). Using 2019 per official source.

Total funding: dynamicbusiness.com claims $238M (including an unverified Series C in Oct 2025 led by a16z/ICONIQ), but all primary sources (Crunchbase, PitchBook, PR Newswire, LinkedIn) consistently report $138M across 3 rounds as of early 2026. $138M used as verified figure.
HQ: Crunchbase lists New York, NY; PitchBook lists San Francisco, CA; official company page references both New York and San Francisco. New York used per Crunchbase and official press releases.
Headcount: multiple third-party sources (Tracxn, PitchBook, LeadIQ, GetLatka) converge around 127–135 employees as of late 2025/early 2026; no official company-stated figure found.
